text: Certainly will the believers have succeeded:
tl: Qad aflahal mu'minoon

text: They who are during their prayer humbly intent
tl: Allazeena hum fee Salaatihim khaashi'oon

text: And they who turn away from ill speech
tl: Wallazeena hum 'anil laghwi mu'ridoon

text: And they who are observant of zakāh
tl: Wallazeena hum liz-Zakaati faa'iloon

text: And they who guard their private parts
tl: Wallazeena hum lifuroo-jihim haafizoon

text: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they will not be blamed -
tl: Illaa 'alaaa azwaajihim aw maa malakat aimaanuhum fa-innahum ghairu maloomeen

text: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors -
tl: Famanib taghaa waraaa'a zaalika fa-ulaaa'ika humul 'aadoon

text: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive
tl: Wallazeena hum li-amaanaatihim Wa-'ahdihim raa'oon

text: And they who carefully maintain their prayers -
tl: Wallazeena hum 'alaa Salawaatihim yuhaafizoon

text: Those are the inheritors
tl: Ulaaa'ika humul waarisoon

text: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally.
tl: Allazeena yarisoonal Firdawsa hum feehaa khaalidoon

text: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay.
tl: Wa-laqad khalaqnal insaana min sulaalatim min teen

text: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging [i.e., the womb].
tl: Summa ja'alnaahu nutfatan fee qaraarim makeen

text: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allāh, the best of creators.
tl: Summa khalaqnan nutfata 'alaqatan fakhalaqnal 'alaqata mudghatan fakhalaq-nal mudghata 'izaaman fakasawnal 'izaama lahman summa anshaanaahu khalqan aakhar; fatabaarakal laahu ahsanul khaaliqeen

text: Then indeed, after that you are to die.
tl: Summa innakum ba'da zaalika la-maaiyitoon

text: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected.
tl: Summa innakum Yawmal Qiyaamati tub'asoon

text: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.
tl: Wa-laqad khalaqnaa fawqakum sab'a taraaa'iqa Wa-maa kunnaa 'anil khalqi ghaafileen

text: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.
tl: Wa-anzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'am biqadarin fa-askannaahu fil ardi Wa-innaa 'alaa zahaabim bihee laqaa-diroon

text: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.
tl: Fa-anshaanaa lakum bihee Jannaatim min nakheelinw Wa-a'naab; lakum feehaa fawaakihu kaseeratunw Wa-minhaa taakuloon

text: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food [i.e., olives] for those who eat.
tl: Wa-shajaratan takhruju min Toori Sainaaa'a tambutu bidduhni Wa-sibghil lil-aakileen

text: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.
tl: Wa-inna lakum fil an'aami la'ibrah; nusqeekum mimmaa fee butoonihaa Wa-lakum feehaa manaafi'u kaseeratunw Wa-minhaa taakuloon

text: And upon them and on ships you are carried.
tl: Wa-'alaihaa wa'alal fulki tuhmaloon

text: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, \"O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?\"
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Noohan ilaa qawmihee faqaala yaa qawmi'budul laaha maa lakum min ilahin ghairuhoo afalaa tattaqoon

text: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, \"This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allāh had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.
tl: Faqaalal mala'ul lazeena kafaroo min qawmihee maa haazaaa illaa basharum mislukum yureedu aien yatafaddala 'alaikum Wa-law shaaa'al laahu la-anzala malaaa'ikatam maa sami'naa bihaazaa feee aabaaa'inal awwaleen

text: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time.\"
tl: In huwa illaa rajulum bihee jinnatun fatarabbasoo bihee hattan heen

text: [Noah] said, \"My Lord, support me because they have denied me.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbin surnee bimaa kazzaboon

text: So We inspired to him, \"Construct the ship under Our observation and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into it [i.e., the ship] from each [creature] two mates and your family, except him for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.
tl: Fa-awhainaaa ilaihi anis na'il fulka bi-a'yuninaa Wa-wahyinaa fa-izaa jaaa'a amrunaa Wa-faarat tannooru fasluk feehaa min kullin zawjainis naini Wa-ahlaka illaa man sabaqa 'alaihil qawlu minhum Wa-laa tukhaat-ibnee fil lazeena zalamooo innaahum mughraqoon

text: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allāh who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'
tl: Fa-izas tawaita ata Wa-mam ma'aka 'alal fulki faqulil hamdu lillaahil lazee najjaanaa minal qawmiz zalimeen

text: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].'\"
tl: Wa-qur Rabbi anzilnee munzalam mubaarakanw Wa-Anta khairul munzileen

text: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].
tl: Inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatinw Wa-in kunnaa lamubtaleen

text: Then We produced after them a generation of others.
tl: Summaa anshaana mim ba'dihim qarnan aakhareen

text: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], \"Worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?\"
tl: Fa-arsalnaa feehim Rasoolam minhum ani 'budul laaha maa lakum min ilaahin ghairuhoo afalaa tattaqoon

text: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, \"This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.
tl: Wa-qaalal mala-u min qawmihil lazeena kafaroo Wa-kazzaboo bi-liqaaa'il Aakhirati Wa-atrafnaahum fil hayaatid dunyaa maa haazaaa illaa basharum mislukum yaakulu mimmaa taakuloona minhu Wa-yashrabu mimmaa tashraboon

text: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.
tl: Wa-la'in at'atum basharam mislakum innakum izal lakhaasiroon

text: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?
tl: A-Ya'idukum annakum izaa mittum Wa-kuntum turaabanw Wa-izaaman annakum mukhrajoon

text: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.
tl: Haihaata haihaata limaa too'adoon

text: It [i.e., life] is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.
tl: In hiya illaa hayaatunad dunyaa namootu Wa-nahyaa Wa-maa nahnu bimab'ooseen

text: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him.\"
tl: In huwa illaa rajulunif taraa 'alal laahi kazibanw Wa-maa nahnuu lahoo bimu'mineen

text: He said, \"My Lord, support me because they have denied me.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbin surnee bimaa kazzaboon

text: [Allāh] said, \"After a little, they will surely become regretful.\"
tl: Qaala 'ammaa qaleelil la-yusbihunna naadimeen

text: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.
tl: Fa-akhazat-humus saihatu bilhaqqi faja'alnaahum ghusaaa'aa; fabu;dal lilqaw-miz zaalimeen

text: Then We produced after them other generations.
tl: Summa anshaanaa mim ba'dihim quroonan aakhareen

text: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].
tl: Maa tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahaa Wa-maa yastaakhiroon

text: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe.
tl: Summa arsalnaa Rusulanaa tatraa kulla maa jaaa'a ummatar Rasooluhaa kazzabooh; fa-atba'naa ba'dahum ba'danw Wa-ja'alnaahum ahaadees; fabu'dal liqawmil laa yu'minoon

text: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority
tl: Summa arsalnaa Moosaa Wa-akhaahu Haaroona bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-sultaanim mubeen

text: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.
tl: Ilaa Fir'awna Wa-mala'ihee fastakbaroo Wa-kaanoo qawman 'aaleen

text: They said, \"Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?\"
tl: Faqaaloo annu'minu libasharaini mislinaa Wa-qawmuhumaa lanaa 'aabidoon

text: So they denied them and were of those destroyed.
tl: Fakazzaboohumaa fakaanoo minal muhlakeen

text: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba la'allahum yahtadoon

text: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.
tl: Wa-ja'alnab na Maryama Wa-ummahooo aayatannw Wa-aawainaahumaaa ilaa rabwatin zaati qaraarinw Wa-ma'een

text: [Allāh said], \"O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.
tl: Yaaa-aiyuhar Rusulu kuloo minat taiyibaati wa'maloo saalihan innee bimaa ta'maloona 'Aleem

text: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me.\"
tl: Wa-inna haaziheee ummatukum ummatanw waahidatanw Wa-Ana Rabbukum fattaqoon

text: But they [i.e., the people] divided their religion among them into portions [i.e., sects] - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing.
tl: Fataqatta'ooo amrahum bainahum zuburaa; kullu hizbim bimaa ladaihim farihoon

text: So leave them in their confusion for a time.
tl: Fazarhum fee ghamratihim hattaa heen

text: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children
tl: A-yahsaboona annnamaa numiduhum bihee mim maalinw Wa-baneen

text: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.
tl: Nusaari'u lahum fil khairaat; bal laa yash'uroon

text: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord
tl: Innal lazeena hum min khashyati Rabbihim mushfiqoon

text: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord
tl: Wallazeena hum bi-Aayaati Rabbihim yu'minoon

text: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord
tl: Wallazeena hum bi-Rabbihim laa yushrikoon

text: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -
tl: Wallazeena yu'toona maaa aataw Wa-quloobuhum wajilatun annahum ilaa Rabbihim raaji'oon

text: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.
tl: Ulaaa'ika yusaari'oona fil khairaati Wa-hum lahaa saabiqoon

text: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.
tl: Wa-laa nukallifu nafsan illaa wus'ahaa Wa-ladainaa kitaabuny yantiqu bilhaqqi Wa-ahum la yuzlamoon

text: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,
tl: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratim min haazaa Wa-lahum a'maalum min dooni zaalika hum lahaa 'aamiloon

text: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.
tl: Hattaaa izaaa akhaznaa mutrafeehim bil'azaabi izaa hum yaj'aroon

text: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.
tl: Laa taj'arul yawma innakum minnaa laa tunsaroon

text: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels
tl: Qad kaanat Aayaatee tutlaa 'alaikum fakuntum 'alaaa a'qaabikum tankisoon

text: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.
tl: Mustakbireena bihee saamiran tahjuroon

text: Then have they not reflected over the word [i.e., the Qur’ān], or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?
tl: Afalam yaddabbarrul qawla am jaaa'ahum maa lam yaati aabaaa'ahumul awwaleen

text: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?
tl: Am lam ya'rifoo Rasoolahum fahum lahoo munkiroon

text: Or do they say, \"In him is madness\"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.
tl: Am yaqooloona bihee jinnnah; bal jaaa'ahum bilhaqqi Wa-aksaruhum lil-haqqi kaarihoon

text: But if the Truth [i.e., Allāh] had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.
tl: Wa-lawit taba'al haqqu ahwaaa'ahum lafasadatis samaawaatu wal-ardu Wa-man feehinnn; bal atainaahum bizikrihim fahum 'an zikrihim mu'ridoon

text: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.
tl: Am tas'aluhum kharjan fakharaaju Rabbika khairunw Wa-Huwa khairur raaziqeen

text: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.
tl: Wa-innaka latad'oohum ilaa Siraatim Mustaqeem

text: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.
tl: Wa-innnal lazeena laa yu'minoona bil-Aakhirati 'anis siraati lanaakiboon

text: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.
tl: Wa-law rahimnaahum Wa-kashafnaa maa bihim min durril lalajjoo fee tughyaanihim ya'mahoon

text: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]
tl: Wa-laqad akhaznaahum bil'azaabi famas takaanoo li-Rabbihim Wa-maa yatadarra'oon

text: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.
tl: Hattaaa izaa fatahnaa 'alaihim baaban zaa 'azaabin shadeedin izaa hum feehi mublisoon

text: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazeee ansha-a lakumus sam'a wal-absaara wal-af'idah; qaleelam maa tashkuroon

text: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee zara-akum fil ardi Wa-ilaihi tuhsharoon

text: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason?
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee yuhyee Wa-yumeetu Wa-lahukh tilaaful laili wannahaar; afalaa ta'qiloon

text: Rather, they say like what the former peoples said.
tl: Bal qaaloo misla maa qaalal awwaloon

text: They said, \"When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
tl: Qaalooo 'a-izaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaabanw Wa-'izaaman 'a-innaa lamab-'oosoon

text: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples.\"
tl: Laqad wu'idnaa nahnu Wa-aabaaa'unaa haazaa min qablu in haazaaa illaaa asaateerul awwaleen

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know?\"
tl: Qul limanil ardu Wa-man feehaaa in kuntum ta'lamoon

text: They will say, \"To Allāh.\" Say, \"Then will you not remember?\"
tl: Sa-yaqooloona lillaah; qul afalaa tazakkkaroon

text: Say, \"Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne?\"
tl: Qul mar Rabbus samaawaatis sab'i Wa-Rabbul 'Arshil 'Azeem

text: They will say, \"[They belong] to Allāh.\" Say, \"Then will you not fear Him?\"
tl: Sa-yaqooloona lillaah; qul afalaa tattaqoon

text: Say, \"In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know?\"
tl: Qul mam bi-yadihee malakootu kulli shai'inw Wa-Huwa yujeeru Wa-laa yujaaru 'alaihi in kuntum ta'lamoon

text: They will say, \"[All belongs] to Allāh.\" Say, \"Then how are you deluded?\"
tl: Sa-yaqooloona lillaah; qul fa-annaa tus-haroon

text: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.
tl: Bal atainaahum bil-haqqi Wa-innahum lakaaziboon

text: Allāh has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have [sought to] overcome others. Exalted is Allāh above what they describe [concerning Him].
tl: Mat takhazal laahu minw waladinw Wa-maa kaana ma'ahoo min ilaah; izal lazahaba kullu ilaahim bimaa khalaqa Wa-la'alaa ba'duhum 'alaa ba'd; Subhaannal laahi 'ammaa yasifoon

text: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him].
tl: Aalimil Ghaibi wash-shahhaadati fata'aalaa 'ammaa yushrikoon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised,
tl: Qur Rabbi immmaa turiyannee maa yoo'adoon

text: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people.\"
tl: Rabbi falaa taj'alnee fil qawmiz zaalimeen

text: And indeed, We are Able to show you what We have promised them.
tl: Wa-innaa 'alaaa an nuriyaka maa na'iduhum laqaadiroon

text: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe.
tl: Idfa' billate hiya ahsanus saiyi'ah; nahnu a'lamu bimaa yasifoon

text: And say, \"My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils,
tl: Wa-qur Rabbi a'oozu bika min hamazaatish Shayaateen

text: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me.\"
tl: Wa-a'oozu bika Rabbi aien yahduroon

text: [For such is the state of the disbelievers] until, when death comes to one of them, he says, \"My Lord, send me back
tl: Hattaaa izaa jaaa'a ahada-humul mawtu qaala Rabbir ji'oon

text: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind.\" No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected.
tl: La'alleee a'malu saalihan feemaa taraktu kallaa; innahaa kalimatun huwa qaaa'iluhaa Wa-minw waraaa'ihim barzakhun ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

text: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another.
tl: Fa-izaa nufikha fis Soori falaaa ansaaba bainahum yawma'izinw Wa-laa yatasaaa'aloon

text: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful.
tl: Faman saqulat mawaazee-nuhoo fa-ulaaa'ika humul muflihoon

text: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally.
tl: Wa-man khaffat mawaa-zeenuhoo fa-ulaaa'ikal lazeena khasiroo 'anfusahum fee Jahannama khaalidoon

text: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles.
tl: Talfahu wujoohahumun Naaru Wa-hum feehaa kaalihoon

text: [It will be said], \"Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them?\"
tl: Alam takun Aayaatee tutlaa 'alaikum fakuntum bihaa tukazziboon

text: They will say, \"Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray.
tl: Qaaloo Rabbanaa ghalabat 'alainaa shiqwatunaa Wa-kunnaa qawman daaalleen

text: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers.\"
tl: Rabbanaa akhrijnaa minhaa fa-in 'udnaa fa-innaa zaalimoon

text: He will say, \"Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me.
tl: Qaalakh sa'oo feehaa Wa-laa tukallimoon

text: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.'
tl: Innahoo kaana fareequm min 'ibaadee yaqooloona Rabbanaaa aamannaa faghfir lanaa warhamnaa Wa-Anta khairur raahimeen

text: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.
tl: Fattakhaztumoohum sikhriyyan hattaaa ansawkum zikree Wa-kuntum minhum tadhakoon

text: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success].\"
tl: Inee jazaituhumul Yawma bimaa sabarooo annahum humul faaa'izoon

text: [Allāh] will say, \"How long did you remain on earth in number of years?\"
tl: Qaala kam labistum fil ardi 'adada sineen

text: They will say, \"We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate.\"
tl: Qaaloo labisnaa yawman aw ba'da yawmin fas'alil 'aaaddeen

text: He will say, \"You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.
tl: Qaala il labistum illaa qaleelal law annakum kuntum ta'lamoon

text: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?\"
tl: Afahsibtum annamaa khalaqnaakum 'abasanw Wa-annakum ilainaa laa turja'oon

text: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.
tl: Fata'aalal laahul Malikul Haqq; laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa Rabbul 'Arshil Kareem

text: And whoever invokes besides Allāh another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.
tl: Wa-maien yad'u ma'allaahi ilaahan aakhara laa burhaana lahoo bihee fa-inna maa hisaabuhoo 'inda Rabbih; innahoo laa yuflihul kaafiroon

text: And, [O Muḥammad], say, \"My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful.\"
tl: Wa-qul Rabbigh fir warham Wa-Anta khairur raahimeen
